title: Gold Large Number 2 Balloons: 40 Inch Giant Foil Number Mylar Balloon Age 0-9 Big Helium Balloon for 2nd Birthday Party Baby Shower Decorations
features: LARGE SIZED - Each pack comes with 1pc 40inch gold 2 balloon number and 1 straw, these number balloons in classic color set can make your party more eye-catching and make your party more unique
PREMIUM Material - Our gold number balloons are made of high-quality aluminum foil, shiny, strong and durable, not easy to break and not easy to leak

EASY TO USE - This golden 2 foil balloon number has a self-sealing glue inside the inflation hole, before inflating, you can use the straw came with the package to open the hole, it can be completely sealed by pinching after filling the balloon

WIDE APPLICATIONS - These gold yellow foil helium balloons are brightly colored, perfect for boys and girls birthday parties, baby showers, weddings, anniversaries and other party decorations, you can choose to combine 0-9 numbers for different applications
AFTER-SALES SERVICE - We are committed to providing the best service. If you have any problems during use, please contact us by email, we will try our best to address your issue
description: Product Description AULE Balloon Number - The package of 1 number balloon is perfect for birthdays or anniversaries. - These balloons can be inflated with air, helium and water. The inflated condition of the yellow latex balloons can be kept for at least 2 days. Why choose us: High-quality and safe party decorations. AULE Balloon has been trusted by thousands of satisfied customers. To make a special day for every beautiful occasion is our mission. The customer experience is our highest priority We have ten years of experience in designing decoration products and are committed to creating the most suitable decorative items for your parties, birthdays and events. Specification Material: Polyester Film + Aluminium Foil Model: Number balloon Colors: Available in 5 colours Gold / Silver / Rose Gold / Black / Red Size: 101 cm / 40 inches (Please confirm the product size before making the payment.)
